title: Oyster Shell Processing Protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"69h44","text":"This protocol describes the procedure for sectioning oyster shells, micromilling to extract carbonate powder, and an overview of analyses at the UC Davis Stable Isotope Facility to obtain carbon and oxygen stable isotope ratios of shell carbonate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Benjamin Walther
